# Cariak v1.1 — Deep Research Agent
> Multi-source research (internet, social, academic, news, market) with Pocketto-inspired skill pipeline. Bilingual ID+EN.

## Install
```bash
npx skills add EgiStr/cariak
npx cariak-pi setup
npx cariak-pi doctor
```

## Pipeline (9 skills)
cariak-pitching → cariak-grinding → cariak-advising → cariak-planning → cariak-researching → cariak-synthesizing → cariak-validating → cariak-reflecting → cariak-remembering

## Trigger Phrases
"cariak", "research this", "deep research", "gali ini", "cariak ini", "I want to explore", "teliti ini"

## Hard Gates
- Clarify Gate (pitching): Problem must be clearly defined before grinding
- Quality Gate (reflecting): Output must pass confidence/bias/source-coverage checks
- Validation Gate (validating): Every claim must have a source (Iron Law)

## Sub-agents (5, run in parallel)
- internet-researcher (web-search-mcp, tavily, playwright)
- social-researcher (web-search-mcp: Reddit/HN/X)
- academic-researcher (paper-search-mcp, Semantic Scholar, arXiv)
- news-researcher (tavily, web-search-mcp: news)
- market-researcher (tavily, web-search-mcp, playwright)

## Always-On Outputs
- research-report.md — main synthesis document
- references.json — structured citation graph

## On-Demand Document Templates (12)
prd, tech-spec, adr, competitive-analysis, risk-register, literature-review,
experiment-design, feasibility-study, implementation-roadmap, research-proposal,
technical-report, recommendation-report

## Required MCP Servers
web-search-mcp, paper-search-mcp, tavily, fetch, playwright, memory, github, context7

## Reference CSVs (7)
advisor-personas, brainstorming-methods, citation-standards, coverage-matrix,
question-frameworks, research-methods, source-taxonomy

## File Structure
```
cariak/
├── skills/         # 9 SKILL.md (pipeline phases)
├── subagents/      # 5 researcher sub-agents
├── templates/      # 12 output document templates
├── references/     # 7 CSV + 5 MD/YAML reference files
├── cli/            # cariak-pi CLI (setup, doctor, validate)
├── assets/         # logos, branding
├── docs/examples/  # example research outputs
├── package.json    # npm package config
├── llms.txt        # this file
├── README.md       # English docs
└── README.id.md    # Indonesian docs
```

## Key URLs
- GitHub: https://github.com/EgiStr/cariak
- npm: https://www.npmjs.com/package/cariak
- Issue tracker: https://github.com/EgiStr/cariak/issues
- Skill registry: npx skills add EgiStr/cariak
